# _platform_icon

_Extracted from `brightbean-studio/templates/social_accounts/partials/_platform_icon.html` on 2026-05-14._

{% comment %} Platform SVG icon partial. Usage: {% include
"social_accounts/partials/\_platform_icon.html" with platform="facebook"
size="5" %} {% endcomment %} {% if platform == "facebook" %} <img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-{{ size|default:&#39;5&#39; }} h-{{" /> {% elif platform ==
"instagram" or platform == "instagram_personal" %} <img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-{{ size|default:&#39;5&#39; }} h-{{" /> {% elif platform ==
"[[linkedin|linkedin]]" or platform == "linkedin_personal" or platform ==
"linkedin_company" %} <img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-{{ size|default:&#39;5&#39; }} h-{{" /> {% elif platform ==
"tiktok" %} <img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

"youtube" %} <img

"pinterest" %} <img

"threads" %} <img

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
